subcodes.first_line: O Javád! In the days when the Light of the Manifestation shone forth from the horizon of 'Iráq, We warned all through the clamoring of the deniers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جواد ایامیکه نور ظهور از افق عراق مشرق کل را بنعیق ناعقین اخبار نمودیم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
